      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      static java.util.List<PhysicalObject> POHelper.getObjectsByOption(ObjectOption option, Cabin cabin)
      This method returns all objects identified by a specific ObjectOption within the cabin object.
      Methods in net.bhl.cdt.paxelerate.model.util with parameters of type PhysicalObject 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      T CabinSwitch.casePhysicalObject(PhysicalObject object)
      Returns the result of interpreting the object as an instance of 'Physical Object'
